M-023.NAME: handshake-anomaly-detector
M-023.owns: handshake observation, endpoint churn detection, suspicion scoring and anti-sharing signal emission

exports.fn-observe-peer-handshake: Records last-seen handshake and endpoint data for a device-linked peer
exports.fn-score-peer-anomaly: Scores suspicious concurrent or unstable reuse patterns for one peer

M-023.hotspot: H-009: Handshake anomaly detection can produce false positives on mobile networks if endpoint churn rules are too aggressive
